# Third-Party Notices

<!-- DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. Regenerate with `make notices`. -->

Model Hotel is distributed under the MIT License (see [LICENSE](./LICENSE)).
It bundles the third-party open-source components listed below; each is the
property of its respective authors and is used under the terms reproduced here.

_53 Go modules, 238 npm packages (regenerate with `make notices`)._

## Fonts

The web UI embeds the JetBrains Mono, Onest, and Schibsted Grotesk typefaces, and KaTeX ships its own math fonts. All are licensed under the **SIL Open Font License 1.1**, which permits embedding and redistribution; their license files are included with the font packages below. No on-screen attribution is required.

The following declare a license in metadata but ship no license file in the package; consult the upstream repository for the full text.
